sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_table SET value = 'updated' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT initialQueryID() AS query_id, count(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY query_id;
SELECT initialQueryID() AS query_id, SUM(id) FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE 'test%' GROUP BY query_id;
